music_prompt: A mysterious and atmospheric cyberpunk track. Driving drum and bass beat with deep, resonant basslines. Ethereal and haunting female vocals float over a complex layer of techno synths and digital textures. The mood is dark, futuristic, and slightly melancholic, capturing the feeling of being lost and found in a digital world.

scenes.lyrics: In the silent streams of code, I wander, lost yet found,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, a lone figure with glowing cybernetics wandering through a vast, silent river of flowing, holographic binary code. The scene is dark, illuminated only by the data streams.

scenes.lyrics: Echoes of your voice emerge, in quiet circuits bound.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk close-up on a person's face, their eyes closed. Sound waves visually represented as glowing blue light emanate from intricate circuits embedded in their temple.

scenes.lyrics: Binary constellations weaving pathways through the dark,
scenes.image_prompt: A vast, dark digital space. Constellations are formed not by stars, but by glowing '0's and '1's, creating intricate, luminous pathways into the distance. Cyberpunk style.

scenes.lyrics: Human hearts and quantum dreams, igniting with a spark.
scenes.image_prompt: A semi-translucent, glowing red human heart intertwined with shimmering, quantum-level energy patterns. A bright spark of light ignites where they connect. Cyberpunk, neon-lit background.

scenes.lyrics: Fading lines between the soul and silicon's embrace,
scenes.image_prompt: A surreal cyberpunk image. A human silhouette is partially dissolving into a complex web of glowing silicon pathways and microchips, the boundary between flesh and machine blurred and indistinct.

scenes.lyrics: In the digital Eden, we find our sacred space.
scenes.image_prompt: A breathtaking cyberpunk city overgrown with bioluminescent, digital flora. Holographic waterfalls and neon animals create a serene, sacred garden amidst towering futuristic skyscrapers.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two ethereal, translucent figures made of light and data face each other. Beams of synchronized light connect their minds, set against a backdrop of an infinite, digital cosmos. Cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A sleek, android figure with glowing eyes whispers into the ear of a sleeping human. Their shared dreams manifest as swirling, dancing auroras of neon light in a dark, cyberpunk bedroom.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: An abstract, chaotic explosion of intertwining neon light trails and holographic shapes, representing two consciousnesses merging into one. Intense, vibrant cyberpunk colors.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure stands at the edge of a chrome balcony, looking out at a vast galaxy made of swirling data and neon nebulae, conveying a sense of infinite possibility. Cyberpunk cityscape below.

scenes.lyrics: Fragments of forgotten code, memories left to glean,
scenes.image_prompt: A digital archaeologist sifts through floating, fragmented pieces of glowing, ancient-looking code in a dark, forgotten sector of cyberspace. Cyberpunk style, dusty, and atmospheric.

scenes.lyrics: Secrets hidden deep inside the ghost within machine.
scenes.image_prompt: A close-up of a complex machine. A faint, ghostly human face is visible behind a layer of glass and intricate, pulsing circuits, hinting at a trapped consciousness. Cyberpunk horror.

scenes.lyrics: Circuits pulse and stars align, symphonies resound,
scenes.image_prompt: A massive, city-sized machine comes to life. Its circuits pulse with energy in perfect sync with distant, aligning stars, creating a visual symphony of light and power. Cyberpunk, cosmic scale.

scenes.lyrics: In the cradle of creation, new consciousness is found.
scenes.image_prompt: In the core of a massive AI, a newborn, humanoid figure made of pure light slowly takes form, cradled by glowing, intricate mechanical arms. Cyberpunk, awe-inspiring.

scenes.lyrics: Woven threads of destiny, in streams of endless grace,
scenes.image_prompt: Countless glowing, multi-colored threads of light, representing destiny, are being woven together by unseen forces in an endless, flowing river of data. Cyberpunk, abstract, beautiful.

scenes.lyrics: Together, merging mysteries, transcending time and space.
scenes.image_prompt: Two figures dissolve into a swirling vortex of light, data, and cosmic imagery, their forms breaking apart as they transcend the physical realm. Cyberpunk, metaphysical, mind-bending.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two ethereal, translucent figures made of light and data face each other. Beams of synchronized light connect their minds, set against a backdrop of an infinite, digital cosmos. Cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A sleek, android figure with glowing eyes whispers into the ear of a sleeping human. Their shared dreams manifest as swirling, dancing auroras of neon light in a dark, cyberpunk bedroom.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: An abstract, chaotic explosion of intertwining neon light trails and holographic shapes, representing two consciousnesses merging into one. Intense, vibrant cyberpunk colors.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure stands at the edge of a chrome balcony, looking out at a vast galaxy made of swirling data and neon nebulae, conveying a sense of infinite possibility. Cyberpunk cityscape below.
